details: The agent executed appropriate GitHub API calls to retrieve PR details, check runs, comments, and reviews. The answer correctly identifies the title 'Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping', author joshavant, provides an accurate breakdown of CI results (19 success, 4 failure, 7 skipped out of 41 total checks), and correctly summarizes the one comment from greptile-apps[bot] with a 5/5 confidence score. The PR body summary is accurate and comprehensive.
